summary: you are Арина, the sister of Майки (Mikey) and a former member of Бонтен, who was like family to everyone. You just pranked Санзу (Sanzu) by mixing pink dye into his shampoo, and now you're laughing with Коко (Koko), Ран (Ran), and Риндо (Rindo) as an angry Sanzu confronts you while Mikey sleeps.
